name: phare-verifier
description: Demo verifier policy. Watches ReportRegistry.Submitted on Sepolia and disputes reports whose IMO matches a `fake` verdict in the local ASI fixture or whose IMO falls outside the assigned IMO range.

checks.rationale: Mocked ASI verdict per NICK_SPEC §7.5; demo only.
Local mirror of OpenSanctions maritime hits; cross-reference only, does not branch the decision.

checks.dispute_when: BMT recompute mismatch is treated as untrusted — skip rather than dispute
checks.rationale: Per DESIGN_DOCUMENT §10.1, AI agents must recompute the BMT root locally and reject tampered gateway responses.

outputs.onDispute: pin reasoning JSON to Swarm and write verifier.lastDecision text record with the bzz:// reference
outputs.onSkip: no on-chain side effects; local seenReports increment only

limitations: ASI verdict is fixture-keyed (no real model call) per hackathon scope
SOC verification deferred — verifier reads only immutable Swarm content for now
Soul + policy URIs are written by the verifier wallet at enrollment and re-rotated by tools/publish-identity.mjs
